description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a gable roof featuring a distinct wood grain texture. The main facade includes a single door and a large rectangular window, while the side extension has a smaller, sloped roof. A metal chimney protrudes from the main roof, suggesting a wood stove or fireplace inside. The rear of the cabin displays a circular window and a visible signature or marking on the siding. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the color palette consists of natural wood tones and muted beige. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential or recreational use in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a gable roof, large front window, side extension, and a metal chimney. The exterior features horizontal wood siding and natural wood colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, a large rectangular window, and the main gable roof with a visible chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the triangular gable end, a circular window, and the chimney extending above the roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with a signature or marking, the side extension, and the wood-textured roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end with a large window beneath the roof overhang and the side extension's sloped roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a secondary shed roof extension, both clad in wood-textured material and featuring a metal chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: one large rectangular window on the front facade, one large rectangular window on the side extension, and one small circular window on the gable end; windows are asymmetrically distributed
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door located on the front facade, positioned to the left of the large window
